itemListElement.reviewBody: Their pune school wellington is in a big loss.Management has burned several hundred crores of money because of cutting the corners and narrow mindset. HR lady having a defense background  is blaming arrogance of Anuj and poor planning to be primary reasons for failure.

itemListElement.reviewBody: Poor school...No concern for students safety, even students fall sick, like recent incident where all students fell sick after eating at school, the guardians are not allowed to visit inside, there is no parent teacher interaction where parents can give suggestions or ask for redressal of their grievances......

itemReviewed.name: Unison World School - Salan Gaon,Bhagwant Pur

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Unison World School holds a special place in my heart as a transformative haven where I spent nine formative years. This exceptional institution goes beyond academics, fostering an environment that nurtures not just intellect, but also character. The dedicated faculty, world-class facilities, and emphasis on holistic education have played a pivotal role in shaping my identity.

During my time at Unison, I gained more than just knowledge; I acquired invaluable life skills and a profound sense of confidence. The teachers, mentors, and peers created a supportive community that encouraged me to explore my passions, build resilience, and develop leadership skills. This diverse and inclusive atmosphere allowed me to appreciate different cultures, broadening my perspective and making me a more empathetic individual.

Beyond the classrooms, Unison provided opportunities for extracurricular activities, enabling me to discover my talents and work in teams. The friendships I formed there are enduring, and the memories are treasured. Unison World School's commitment to holistic growth has not only made me academically proficient but has also molded me into a strong, confident, and compassionate individual.

Grateful for this enriching experience, I wholeheartedly recommend Unison World School to parents seeking a nurturing and empowering educational journey for their children.

itemReviewed.name: Unison World School - Salan Gaon,Bhagwant Pur

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Just got to witness UNISON WORLD SCHOOL's  annual function a.k.a APDF a few days back. And must say that right from the sports meet to the Cultural fest under the guidance of the Trinity College London, as mentioned during the show with the girls showcasing an orchestra and the musical drama was just mind blowing.
Also, the cultural fest happening under the presence of the esteemed Chief guest Ms. Saina Nehwal and the  Mr. Rakesh Khatri also known as the "Nestman of India", not only inspired the girls but also motivated the entire audience at large.
And not to forget the carnival themed school fete  and the school exhibition ; everything was just amazing, well planned, well- organised and mesmerizing.
A fantastic job done by the school girls under the expert guidance of the amazing teachers and Principal Dr. Mona Khanna.
Schools like UNISON make you believe that yes, you are at the right place and the right school for your kid.

itemReviewed.name: Unison World School - Salan Gaon,Bhagwant Pur

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Excellent School with great vision ,school has really come a long way and this APDF was phenomenal.
Outstanding orchestra and flawless play. Kudos to the UWS community for always thriving for best.

itemReviewed.name: Unison World School - Salan Gaon,Bhagwant Pur

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Excellent School

Unison World School is an all girls' residential school in Dehradun, Uttarakhand, India. The school teaches from grades VI to XII. Unison World School has tied up with Kilgraston School, Rangi Ruru Girls School, and St. Francis' College, UK for International Exchange Programmes.
